component.name: MainScene
component.script:
function init() m.background = m.top.findNode("background") m.channelGrid = m.top.findNode("channelGrid") m.videoPlayer = m.top.findNode("videoPlayer") m.titleLabel = m.top.findNode("titleLabel")
' Set up screen dimensions m.screenWidth = 1920 m.screenHeight = 1080
' Initialize with demo channels initDemoChannels()
' Set focus to channel grid m.channelGrid.setFocus(true) end function
function initDemoChannels() channels = []
demoChannels = [ { title: "Channel 1", url: "http://example.com/stream1.m3u8", logo: "pkg:/images/icon_hd.png" } { title: "Channel 2", url: "http://example.com/stream2.m3u8", logo: "pkg:/images/icon_hd.png" } { title: "Channel 3", url: "http://example.com/stream3.m3u8", logo: "pkg:/images/icon_hd.png" } { title: "Channel 4", url: "http://example.com/stream4.m3u8", logo: "pkg:/images/icon_hd.png" } { title: "Channel 5", url: "http://example.com/stream5.m3u8", logo: "pkg:/images/icon_hd.png" } ]
m.channelGrid.channels = demoChannels m.channelGrid.selectedIndex = 0 end function
function onKeyEvent(key as string, press as boolean) as boolean if not press return false end if
if key = "OK" or key = "Play" playSelectedChannel() return true else if key = "Back" or key = "Exit" return true end if
return false end function
function playSelectedChannel() channels = m.channelGrid.channels index = m.channelGrid.selectedIndex
if channels <> invalid and index >= 0 and index < channels.count() selected = channels[index] m.videoPlayer.videoContent = selected m.videoPlayer.visible = true end if end function
